name: feature-loader-c6-spike-2
description: Phase 1 spike — sample 2 of 5. NO history clear (depends on -spike-1 having run); reload accumulates a second atlas pipeline build sample. Passes if samples >= 2. The build duration on this load tells us whether Chrome's DawnWebGPUCache is hitting (warm load is fast) or missing (still ~49s).

commands: (() => { const r = window.__canaryGetC6CacheReport(); const atlas = r && r.labels && r.labels['penumbra-render-atlas']; if (!atlas) throw new Error('atlas label missing — was -spike-1 run first? labels=' + JSON.stringify(Object.keys((r && r.labels) || {}))); if (atlas.samples < 2) throw new Error('atlas samples=' + atlas.samples + ' (expected >=2 — depends on -spike-1 having seeded). localStorage may not persist between Canary tests; switch to manual sampling via dev server.'); console.log('[c6-spike-2] sample 2 captured: cold=' + atlas.coldMs + 'ms warmAvg=' + atlas.warmAvgMs + 'ms samples=' + atlas.samples); return 'sample 2 ok'; })()
